title: onopordum acanthium subsp. eriocephalum
intro: Onopordum acanthium subsp. eriocephalum, also known as the cotton thistle or woolly thistle, is a subspecies of the thistle plant characterized by its distinctive, woolly leaves. The medicinal properties of the plant include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of using Onopordum acanthium subsp. eriocephalum may include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
